commonParams.background: clean white or dark navy surface, studio lighting
commonParams.lighting: bright even studio lighting, no harsh shadows
commonParams.avoid: no cluttered backgrounds, no warm/yellow casts

hero-cards.prompt: Professional product photography of vintage baseball cards spread on a dark navy velvet surface, one rare card in a graded case featured prominently, magnifying glass nearby, bright studio lighting, collector aesthetic

graded-card.prompt: Professional product photography of a PSA graded sports card in a clear case with a high grade label, isolated on a clean white background, bright studio lighting, premium collector item aesthetic

vintage-memorabilia.prompt: Professional product photography of a vintage signed baseball in a glass display case, wooden bat beside it, dark navy surface, studio lighting, sports heritage aesthetic, premium presentation

shop-interior.prompt: Professional interior photography of a modern card shop, glass display cases filled with graded cards, wooden shelves with sealed boxes, bright clean lighting, organized and premium, no people

card-break.prompt: Professional product photography of sealed trading card booster boxes arranged in a fan pattern, dark navy background, studio lighting, exciting and premium, collector's dream

jersey-display.prompt: Professional photography of a framed autographed sports jersey in a shadow box, dark wall, museum spotlight, premium presentation, sports heritage, collectible art
